status_legend.priority: Top market for immediate country-page build and active pitching.
status_legend.priority-upside: High-upside market worth featuring prominently, but with more execution risk.
status_legend.priority-global: High-priority non-European market with strong rerating story.
status_legend.active: Current market worth keeping live on site.
status_legend.opportunistic: Selective market; keep live but do not overpromise.
status_legend.watch-active: Keep live only if explicitly framed as high-friction or selective.
status_legend.watch: Low-priority market; keep for completeness, not for active pushing.
status_legend.watchlist: Not immediately executable; display as monitored rather than currently deployable.
status_legend.benchmark: Reference market rather than target frontier market.
status_legend.bonus: Optional next market, not on current live site.

render_rules.watchlist_banner: This market is monitored continuously but is not currently an immediate deployment market.
render_rules.opportunistic_banner: Selective market. Focus on tight scopes, verified title, and realistic exits.
render_rules.source_display: Render source_registry as expandable citations or endnotes.
render_rules.scorecard_scale: 0-10 internal heuristic; 10 is strongest fit for Perfect Mission's current operator model.

optional_additions.reason: Strong fit for future regional expansion if Perfect Mission extends beyond the current 14-market live map.
